name: Big Burger Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Generously grease a 1-1/2 quart glass casserole dish with shortening, using a pastry brush. Sprinkle a little flour into the dish and shake gently from side to side until the flour coats the bottom and sides. Empty out any remaining flour.
3. Prepare the cake mix according to the package directions, then pour the batter into the greased and floured casserole dish.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour and 5-10 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack for about 10 minutes.
5. Turn off the heat and carefully remove the cake from the casserole dish, placing it with the rounded side up.
6. While the cake is cooling, sprinkle sesame seeds on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake in the preheated oven for about 5 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Remove the cookie sheet from the oven and set aside.
8. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat. Stir in brown sugar, cooking for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add milk and continue to cook until it reaches a rolling boil, stirring constantly.
9. Turn off the heat and remove the saucepan from the direct heat. Carefully stir in powdered sugar into the mixture. Place the saucepan back over the pan of cold water and beat until the frosting becomes thick enough to spread. If the frosting is too thin, add more powdered sugar; if it is too thick, add a few drops of hot water.
